records.question: Who are the conductors associated with orchestras where the record company is Mercury Records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE orchestra.record_company = 'Mercury Records'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Conductor_ID FROM conductor AS T1 INNER JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID = T2.Conductor_ID WHERE T2.Record_Company = 'Mercury Records'

records.question: Which conductors named Michael Tilson Thomas, aged at least 42 with no more than 12 years of work, have led the San Francisco Symphony Orchestra founded in 2008 or later that records CDs under RCA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE orchestra.major_record_format = 'CD' AND orchestra.orchestra = 'San Francisco Symphony Orchestra' AND conductor.age >= 42 AND orchestra.year_of_founded >= 2008.0 AND conductor.name = 'Michael Tilson Thomas' AND conductor.year_of_work <= 12 AND orchestra.record_company = 'RCA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Conductor_ID FROM conductor AS T1 INNER JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID = T2.Conductor_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Michael Tilson Thomas' AND T1.Age >= 42 AND T1.Year_of_Work <= 12 AND T2.Orchestra = 'San Francisco Symphony Orchestra' AND T2.Year_of_Founded >= 2008 AND T2.Major_Record_Format = 'CD' AND T2.Record_Company = 'RCA'

records.question: Which conductors are exactly 63 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
WHERE conductor.age = 63
records.pred_sql: SELECT Conductor_ID FROM conductor WHERE Age = 63

records.question: Which conductors named Valeri Gergiev are from the USA, have at most 47 years of age, and have worked for at least 16 years?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
WHERE conductor.age <= 47 AND conductor.name = 'Valeri Gergiev' AND conductor.nationality = 'USA' AND conductor.year_of_work >= 16
records.pred_sql: SELECT Conductor_ID FROM conductor WHERE Name = 'Valeri Gergiev' AND Nationality = 'USA' AND Age <= 47 AND Year_of_Work >= 16

records.question: Who are the UK conductors associated with the Philharmonia Orchestra where the record company is Koch Records / Naxos Records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE orchestra.orchestra = 'Philharmonia Orchestra' AND conductor.nationality = 'UK' AND orchestra.record_company = 'Koch Records / Naxos Records'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Conductor_ID FROM conductor AS T1 INNER JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID = T2.Conductor_ID WHERE T1.Nationality = 'UK' AND T2.Orchestra = 'Philharmonia Orchestra' AND T2.Record_Company IN ('Koch Records', 'Naxos Records')

records.question: Which conductors aged 43, with at least 20 years of work and nationality USA, lead orchestras founded in 2002 where the major record format is CD?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE conductor.year_of_work >= 20 AND conductor.nationality = 'USA' AND orchestra.year_of_founded = 2002.0 AND orchestra.major_record_format = 'CD' AND conductor.age = 43
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Conductor_ID FROM conductor AS T1 INNER JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID = T2.Conductor_ID WHERE T1.Age = 43 AND T1.Year_of_Work >= 20 AND T1.Nationality = 'USA' AND T2.Year_of_Founded = 2002 AND T2.Major_Record_Format = 'CD'

records.question: Which conductors named Antal Doráti are at least 40 years old, have worked for at least 10 years, are from the USA, and lead the London Symphony Orchestra founded in 2003 or earlier that records CDs with Mercury Records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conductor.conductor_id FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE orchestra.major_record_format = 'CD' AND conductor.nationality = 'USA' AND conductor.age >= 40 AND orchestra.orchestra = 'London Symphony Orchestra' AND orchestra.record_company = 'Mercury Records' AND conductor.year_of_work >= 10 AND orchestra.year_of_founded <= 2003.0 AND conductor.name = 'Antal Doráti'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Conductor_ID FROM conductor AS T1 INNER JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID = T2.Conductor_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Antal Doráti' AND T1.Age >= 40 AND T1.Year_of_Work >= 10 AND T1.Nationality = 'USA' AND T2.Orchestra = 'London Symphony Orchestra' AND T2.Year_of_Founded <= 2003 AND T2.Major_Record_Format = 'CD' AND T2.Record_Company = 'Mercury Records'
